name: Western Copper and Gold Corporation
description: Western Copper and Gold Corporation is a copper-gold developer advancing the Casino Project, one of the largest undeveloped copper-gold deposits in North America, located approximately 300 km northwest of Whitehorse, Yukon. The project hosts nearly 21 Moz of gold and 11 billion lbs of copper (M+I+I) with a completed feasibility study outlining a 27-year mine life. The company is backed by strategic investors Rio Tinto and Mitsubishi Materials and is in the permitting and development stage.
